reviews.comment:
Buena E/S buenas intalaciones, el personal es mixto algunos atienden bien otros se tardan demasiado entre cliente y cliente para hacer más lento el trabajo "intencionalmente"

(Translated by Google)
Good I/O, good facilities, the staff is mixed; some provide good service, others take too long between customers, intentionally slowing down the work.

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia Freddy, muchas gracias por tu comentario y calificación, estamos trabajando para mejorar la rapidez del servicio. te esperamos nuevamente en YPF ACA Belgrano

reviews.comment:
Le di 1000p al playero de la noche que me limpio el parabrisas (que estaba impecable) y le pareció poco

(Translated by Google)
I gave 1000p to the beach attendant who cleaned my windshield that night (which was spotless) and he thought it wasn't enough.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNmM0xuM0Z3EAE

reviews.comment:
La peor estacion de servicio q conocí,  te atienden en forma prepotente , te maltratan , ya por tercera vez que no tienen el posnet de  Modo del  banco nacion ,  cuando yo le pregunte antes de cargar una VERGÜENZA. , mentirosos me dijeron q si y después toman el pelo dicen  qué arregle con el banco, cunado son ellos q no tienen  el posnet
Si tienen posibilidad vayan a cualquier otra a cargar nafta , unos maleducados y aparte  me dejaron sin la posibilidad de mi descuento $ 15.000 .
También le di la baja a la asociación.
Igualmente no les importo nada .

(Translated by Google)
The worst gas station I've ever been to. They treat you arrogantly and rudely. This is the third time they've had a Banco Nación card reader, even though I asked before filling up. It's a disgrace. They lied and said they did, then tried to pull the wool over my eyes by telling me to sort it out with the bank, when it's them who don't have the card reader. If you have the option, go anywhere else to fill up. They're incredibly rude, and on top of that, they prevented me from getting my $15,000 discount. I also canceled my membership. They didn't care at all.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNmeFA2UVBREAE
